name: Moleculin Biotech, Inc.
summary: BUSINESS Business Summary We are a late-stage pharmaceutical development company currently evaluating Annamycin, also known as L-Annamycin and by its generic name naxtarubicin, which we believe is anext-generation anthracycline and, with it, are conducting a pivotal Phase 3 trial in combination with cytarabine for the treatment of subjects with relapsed/refractory (R/R) acute myeloid leukemia (AML). We call this the MIRACLE trial (derived from Moleculin R/R AML AnnAraC Clinical Evaluation).A bli...
